AuthSignIn.title: Sign in
AuthSignIn.description: Welcome back. Please enter your credentials.
AuthSignIn.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

AuthRegister.title: Create account
AuthRegister.description: Enter your details to register for the platform.
AuthRegister.signupDisabled: Self-service registration is disabled. Please contact an administrator.

CmsHome.emptyDescription: Your CMS homepage is set but it does not have any content blocks yet. Start building in the admin panel to replace this placeholder with your custom layout.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: We couldn't find the page you were looking for.
NotFound.frontendDescription: We couldn't find what you're looking for.

Hero.titleStart: A modern storefront that feels tailored
Hero.description: Highlight your best products, give every collection a story, and keep the look aligned with your CMS theme without extra layout work.
Hero.setupStepOne: Upload your logo and brand colors.
Hero.featuredStackDescription: Use the CMS appearance controls to keep each section consistent, then spotlight the products that deserve attention.
Hero.focusTitle: Design for discovery, then let the catalog do the rest.
Hero.focusDescription: Pair editorial sections with product cards to guide visitors toward what you want to sell most.

Signature.title: Bring a sense of direction to every collection.
Signature.description: Use this editorial band to spotlight new releases, seasonal edits, or staff picks. It keeps the focus tight while the catalog grows.
Signature.launchKitDescription: From brand setup to live link.

Highlights.title: Everything you need to make the homepage feel complete.
Highlights.description: The fallback layout balances storytelling with shopping, so you can launch while your CMS pages are still coming together.
Highlights.itemOneDescription: Blend storytelling and commerce with hero, highlights, and product grids.
Highlights.itemTwoDescription: Every section respects your CMS appearance palette and display modes.
Highlights.itemThreeDescription: Keep attention on the catalog with clean, image-led cards.

Collections.title: Build a narrative around your catalog.
Collections.description: Create small edits and spotlight them with scrollable cards.
Collections.seasonalEditDescription: A focused set of seasonal picks.
Collections.essentialsDescription: Core items that anchor the catalog.

Products.title: Featured catalog
Products.description: Keep your best items front and center with a clean, image-first grid.
Products.emptyDescription: Your products will appear here once you add them in the admin panel. Start by creating a few featured items and uploading imagery.

NextSteps.title: Want a fully custom homepage?
NextSteps.description: Build a CMS landing page and swap this fallback for bespoke layouts whenever you are ready.

Footer.description: Curated commerce powered by your CMS appearance settings.

Product.noDescription: No description available yet. Add details in the admin panel to make this product stand out.
Product.themeAlignedDescription: Built to match your CMS appearance settings.
Product.catalogReadyDescription: Showcase tags, categories, and inventory status.
Product.confidentDisplayDescription: Highlight pricing, specs, and availability at a glance.

KangurPublic.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading the Kangur application.

KangurLogin.defaultSessionDescription: Parents sign in with email and password. Students sign in with their nickname and password.
KangurLogin.magicLinkDeprecatedNotice: Email link sign-in is no longer available. Sign in with email and password or create an account.
KangurLogin.verifyParentEmailFailed: We couldn't verify the parent email.
KangurLogin.createAccountInstruction: Click the verification link in the email. Then sign in with the same email and password.
KangurLogin.createParentAccountFailed: We couldn't create the parent account.
KangurLogin.createParentAccountUnexpected: An error occurred while creating the account.
KangurLogin.resendEmailUnexpected: An error occurred while sending the email.
KangurLogin.enterParentEmailAndPassword: Enter the parent email and password.
KangurLogin.emailUnverifiedNotice: Verify the parent email before signing in. You can also send a new verification email.
KangurLogin.passwordSetupRequiredNotice: This older parent account doesn't have a password yet. Set a password below and we'll send a verification email.
KangurLogin.parentLoginFailed: We couldn't sign the parent in.
KangurLogin.parentLoginUnexpected: An error occurred while signing the parent in.
KangurLogin.enterStudentLoginAndPassword: Enter the student nickname and password.
KangurLogin.invalidLearnerLoginNotice: The student nickname may only contain letters, numbers, and hyphens.
KangurLogin.studentLoginFailed: We couldn't sign the student in.
KangurLogin.studentLoginUnexpected: An error occurred while signing the student in.
KangurLogin.resendHelper: A new email can be sent in {label}.
KangurLogin.passwordRequirement: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
KangurLogin.verificationSentTo: We sent a verification link to:
KangurLogin.verificationAction: Click the link in the email to activate the account.

AuthApi.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
AuthApi.passwordSetupRequired: Password setup is required before email verification can continue.
AuthApi.ipNotAllowed: This IP is not allowed for the account.

KangurAuthApi.notificationsDisabled: Verification email sending is currently disabled. Contact the administrator.
KangurAuthApi.captchaMissing: Confirm that you are not a bot.
KangurAuthApi.parentAccountReady: The parent account is ready. Sign in with email and password.
KangurAuthApi.parentVerificationResent: We sent a new verification email. The parent account will activate after the address is verified.
KangurAuthApi.parentEmailConflict: An account with this email already exists. Sign in with email and password.
KangurAuthApi.verificationAlreadySent: A verification email has already been sent. Wait {label} and try again.
KangurAuthApi.emailVerificationDisabled: Email verification is disabled for this project.
KangurAuthApi.pendingParentAccountMissing: We couldn't find a pending parent account for this email. Create the account again.
KangurAuthApi.emailVerificationLinkInvalid: This email verification link is no longer valid.
KangurAuthApi.parentAccountUnavailable: This parent account is no longer available.
KangurAuthApi.passwordAlreadySet: A password is already set for this account. You can sign in with email and password.
KangurAuthApi.parentPasswordSet: The parent password has been set. You can now sign in with email and password.
KangurAuthApi.onlyParentCanSetPassword: Only parent accounts can set a parent password.
KangurAuthApi.passwordTooWeak: The password does not meet the security requirements.
KangurAuthApi.passwordMinLength: The password must be at least {count} characters long.
KangurAuthApi.passwordUppercase: The password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
KangurAuthApi.passwordLowercase: The password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
KangurAuthApi.passwordNumber: The password must contain at least one number.
KangurAuthApi.passwordSymbol: The password must contain at least one special character.
